title: Support  - Poly Product Support screen color in light mode
scenario: Verify that the top box color on the Product Support screen matches the main body color in light mode.
steps: 2. Start the app in light mode.
3. Navigate to Poly Lens Menu > Support.
5. Check the top box of the screen.
expected: 1. User is redirected to the Poly support page. 2. The color of the top box should match the color of the main body of the screen.
